_meta.description: FGA Single Source of Truth — every fact that repeats across the site lives here. Run 'node fga-build.js' to propagate changes to all HTML files.
_meta.usage: Tag any HTML element with data-fga="key" to bind it. The build script replaces inner text with the value from this file.

universities.umpi_name: UMPI (University of Maine at Presque Isle)

chapters.ch1_desc: The traditional path is broken. Discover the system's own rules — and how to use them to graduate years ahead.
chapters.ch2_desc: Before you touch a single exam, get your mind right. The Emotional Cycle of Change and how to engineer motivation.
chapters.ch3_desc: Credit stacking is the core strategy. Earn the same college credits for a fraction of the cost and time.
chapters.ch4_desc: 34 exams, ~$97 each, accepted at 2,900+ schools. The highest-ROI credit pathway available — free with Modern States.
chapters.ch5_desc: Fill the gaps CLEP can't cover. DSST, self-study AP, and the ACE providers that pre-load 60+ credits.
chapters.ch6_desc: John's secret weapon. Take real college courses in high school — often completely free.
chapters.ch7_desc: The operational backbone. Map every degree requirement to its exam equivalent and verify every credit transfers.
chapters.ch8_desc: Forget highlighting. Evidence-based techniques that let you pass college exams in 2–3 weeks of focused study.
chapters.ch9_desc: 7 copy-ready AI prompts, 10 best tools, and the communities that will keep you accountable and on track.
chapters.ch10_desc: Find your starting point. The 52-week bachelor's degree timeline — and the two universities that make it possible.
chapters.ch11_desc: Credit stacking is a financial strategy. The math that reveals $208,000+ in total lifetime financial advantage.
chapters.ch12_title: Getting the Most Out of College
chapters.ch12_desc: What to do once you're there. Why employers and grad schools respect accelerated degrees — with data.
